title: Arachniodes haniffii
intro: Arachniodes haniffii, also known as Haniff's fern or pinna fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant has been found to have potential health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which may contribute to its use in traditional medicine for various purposes. The bioactive constituents of Arachniodes haniffii include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Arachniodes haniffii is often prepared as a tea or tincture, or used in combination with other herbs in formulations for its purported health benefits.
